questions.question: A car travels at a speed of 40 mph over a certain distance and then returns over the same distance at a speed of 60 mph. What is the average speed for the total journey?
What is the purpose of the 'super' keyword in OOP?

answers.A2: To access parent class methods and constructors

questions.key: To access parent class methods and constructors
questions.justification: The 'super' keyword allows a subclass to call methods or constructors defined in its parent class.

questions.question: What is API (Application Programming Interface)?

answers.A2: High-level interface defining how software components interact through functions/methods

questions.key: High-level interface defining how software components interact through functions/methods
questions.justification: API specifies how to request services from software libraries or operating systems using well-defined functions.

questions.question: What is a map in STL?

answers.A2: An associative container storing key-value pairs in sorted order

questions.key: An associative container storing key-value pairs in sorted order
questions.justification: Map stores elements as key-value pairs, maintains sorted order by key, and provides O(log n) search/insert/delete.
